new_terms.context: Refers to large-scale cloud providers like AWS, Google, and Meta who customize hardware.
Original Design Manufacturers like Quanta or Wiwynn that handle hyperscaler assembly.
Joint Design Manufacturing, a collaborative model between chip vendors and hyperscalers.
Rack-level integration and testing stage in the assembly logistics chain.
Data center-level integration and final deployment stage.
Standardized blueprints provided by NVIDIA for partners to build Blackwell systems.
